description: Generic schema for DSM core symptom evidence with severity details.

presence.description: Whether the symptom is present in the target window.
presence.title: Presence

duration_weeks.description: Duration of the symptom in weeks. Include 0 if less than one week.
duration_weeks.title: Duration Weeks

frequency.description: Approximate frequency categorisation in the observation period.

impairment_domains.description: Functional domains impaired due to the symptom. Empty or null if none.
impairment_domains.title: Impairment Domains

source_snippet.description: Verbatim snippet supporting the extraction for audit trail.
source_snippet.title: Source Snippet

title: CoreSymptomEvidence
